store/product-comparison.drawer.min-item: You need to add at least two products to compare

store/product-comparison.drawer.title: Compare products
Global configuration for the product comparison feature. Applies to all PLPs.
When enabled, the Compare button and the bottom bar appear on products whose category is in the enabled categories list
List of category IDs where the comparator is shown
Numeric category ID (visible in the VTEX admin)
List of collection (productCluster) IDs where the comparator is shown
Numeric cluster/collection ID (Catalog → Collections in the admin)
List of paths where the comparator is shown. Use /sheets for exact match or /sheets/* for subpath match.
Path relative to domain, no host. Example: /sheets or /collection/summer/*
